content.en:
this day.

Ye Tian copied the body of a Blood Transformation Realm creature, this was a Blood Transformation Realm creature he had killed in the past, so even if it was exposed, there was no problem, and the other party couldn't find anything.

After this replica body entered the White Elephant City, he inquired about the news of the primeval golden blood in the White Elephant City.

Many Blood Transformation Realms don't know what Ancient Golden Blood is, but some races do.

Finally, he was in a shop, and a Blood Transformation Realm creature informed him of the situation of the Ancient Golden Blood.

"We don't have Ancient Golden Blood in our shop, and the same goes for you when you go to other shops, there is no store that sells Ancient Golden Blood!" the Blood Mutant creature revealed.

"Why?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"First, the primeval gold blood is very rare and very valuable. Second, the White Shadow Elephant Clan and a few other top clans would buy the Ancient Golden Blood, and the price would be very high, so they would not sell it. The blood-mutated creature explained.

Ye Tian understood, just like the former primeval golden turtle clan, he must have acquired the primeval golden blood.

The other top clans, even if they don't have the inheritance of the primeval arts, still want to store some primeval golden blood.

Therefore, there will be no primeval gold blood for sale in the White Elephant City.

"Do you know where the primeval blood will be born?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Blood Mutant creature smiled, "I know, but you'll have to pay 100 White Elephant Gold for me to tell you." "

"Yes!

Ye Tian agreed.

He then handed the Blood Mutant creature 100 White Elephant Gold.

After the Blood Transformation Realm creature obtained the White Elephant Gold, he revealed: "There are many places where the primeval golden blood was born in the territorial sea boundary rift, but the easiest place to give birth to the primeval gold blood is the primeval ruins, which are the ruins formed by a group of powerful races fighting there in the primeval era of the territorial sea boundary rift, and the primeval gold blood is actually a substance that the blood of some primeval races has evolved over countless years and finally evolved. "

"An ancient race like the primeval golden beetle?"

Ye Tian asked.

"The Ancient Golden Turtle Clan is what kind of Ancient Race it is!" the Blood Transformation Realm creature mocked, "They're just descendants of the Ancient Race, anyway, I haven't seen the real Ancient Race yet!"

"Where are the primeval ruins?"

Ye Tian asked again.

"You need to give 50 white elephant gold for this question!" the blood-mutated creature demanded again.

"Okay, I'll give it!"

Ye Tian took out another 50 White Elephant Gold and handed it to this Blood Transformation Realm creature.

"Give you the location coordinates!"

The other party directly threw over a map with the coordinates of the ancient ruins.

After getting the information of the primeval golden blood and the coordinates of the primeval ruins, Ye Tian left the shop, and then left the White Elephant City.

Not long after he left White Elephant City, a White Shadow Elephant stopped him.

"Ji Heng!"

This White Shadow Elephant Clan's Boundary-Breaking Level Fourth Blood Transformation Realm genius actually appeared here, apparently because he had attracted the attention of the other party by looking for the Ancient Golden Blood.

"You inquired about the Ancient Golden Blood in the White Elephant City, did you find the Ancient Gold Leaf?"

Ji Heng asked.

And the surrounding void has been blocked by the other party, and there is even a small bell to suppress here, and the news will definitely not be transmitted.

Swire Gold Leaf!

Ye Tian knew that the leaf hidden by the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan should be the Ancient Gold Leaf, and a piece of Ancient Gold Leaf contained an Ancient Technique.

"Nope!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

"No?" Ji Heng was furious, "The greatest use of the Ancient Golden Blood is to assist in the cultivation of the Ancient Technique, do you dare to say that you haven't found it? If you don't say it, I'll kill you! Even if you get the Ancient Gold Leaf, you won't be able to practice the Ancient Technique." If you contribute, our White Shadow Elephant Clan is willing to vigorously cultivate you and cultivate your cultivation to the fifth Blood Transformation Realm!"

Cultivating a three-time blood transformation creature to a five-time blood transformation realm creature and replacing it with other blood transformation realm creatures must be extremely exciting.

However, Ye Tian didn't care.

Moreover, he would not give up the primeval art of the Ancient God and Demon Fist.

However, his replica body was indeed far from Ji Heng's opponent, so he directly annihilated this replica body.

Airplanes!!!!

The body is annihilated, leaving no trace.

“......"

Ji Heng was stunned, didn't say a word, and directly committed suicide to annihilate his body?

What kind of operation is this, he can't understand it a little!

If you committed suicide, why didn't you hand over the primeval gold leaf?

Of course, there is another possibility.

"Chess pieces!" Ji Heng thought.

If this three-time blood transformation realm creature is just a chess piece, instead of the blood transformation realm creature behind the scenes, it will be completely controlled by the other party.

Therefore, direct suicide becomes a possibility.

After that, he returned to the White Shadow Elephant Clan and reported the information.

Soon, he came to the headquarters of the White Shadow Elephant Clan and met a great elder of the White Shadow Elephant Clan, Chihe!

The Great Elder of Chihe is the seventh blood transformation realm of the White Shadow Elephant Clan, and his strength is extremely strong and his status is also very high.

"Elder Chihe, I found a three-time blood transformation realm creature who tried to buy the primeval golden blood in White Elephant City, but unfortunately the other party committed suicide directly and didn't ask anything. I suspect that this three-time Blood Transformation Realm creature is just a chess piece, and the Blood Transformation Realm behind the scenes has not appeared. "

Chihe frowned, "So, the Ancient Golden Leaf has been discovered, or does this matter have something to do with the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan?"

"It shouldn't be the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan, the Ancient Golden Turtle Clan has been collecting Ancient Golden Blood for countless years, and they also know that it is impossible to buy Ancient Golden Blood in White Elephant City, and they will not be stupid enough to send a Triple Blood Transformation Realm creature to buy Ancient Golden Blood. Ji Heng said.

"Keep investigating, and continue to stare at the Ancient Turtle Sea, I firmly believe that the Ancient Golden Leaf is still there, even if a Blood Transformation Realm creature is found, he doesn't want to escape from the Ancient Turtle Sea. Chihe ordered.

"I'll send my people over and keep an eye on it!"

Ji Heng responded.

......

The other side.

Ye Tian's true body copied his body and rushed to the ancient ruins, he wanted to find the ancient golden blood here, if he found the ancient golden blood, he could try to cultivate the ancient god and demon fist.

The primeval ruins were a little far away from Ye Tian's location, and they were even close to being out of the White Shadow Clan's sphere of influence.

But the farther away the better, so that he wouldn't attract the attention of the White Shadow Elephants.

After a long journey, he was finally on the verge of reaching the ancient ruins.

Near the ancient ruins, there are more and more Blood Transformation Realm creatures here, and the four Blood Transformation Realm creatures and the five Blood Transformation Realm creatures seem to have become more ordinary, and they are easy to encounter.
